title: Luffy Keeps Moving Toward God
description: The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, 18, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall, Shandia warriors. The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Pardon me. I under- estimated you...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I thought you were another small fry!

summary: The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.
